sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106245" key="u(grome/dwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑγρο-μέδων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n106245.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lord of the water,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:31:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31.57</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
